arguments.argument:
oPlayer1.sprite_index=sJerryDamaged awardAwesome(500) global.checkForDeath=1 global.hitsTaken=0 global.killStreak=0 global.gamePaused=true global.bCanGameOver=true failColor=c_white
failMessage=":3 :3 :3 :3 :3" hintMessage="You know you want to keep going, so we limited your options."
//Reset ammo and player momentum staticEffect=0 oPlayer1.xVel=0 oPlayer1.yVel=0 oPlayer1.xAcc=0 oPlayer1.yAcc=0
//Set up menu backAlpha=0 backColor=c_white
showOptions=0 useCommands=false
menuSelections=1 GOCursorInc=34 GOMenuMax=1 GOMenuMin=1 GOCursorPos=1 GOCursorY=135
confirmPressNum=0 gameOverProg=0 gameOverTime=0
stopLoopingSounds() stopAllMusic() playSound(global.snd_GameOver,0,1,1)
image_speed=0.2 for (i=0;i<7;i+=1) {background_foreground[i]=false} background_visible[7]=true background_foreground[7]=true view_angle[0]=0
confirmFadeOut=0
